The '''LBE flight control computer''' was a computer system designed by [[Arakyd Industries/Legends|Arakyd Industries]]. The LBE had artificial safeties installed to keep a ship from overtaxing itself and potentially tearing itself apart. It was installed in all standard models of the [[Helix-class light interceptor|''Helix''-class light interceptor]], also built by Arakyd.
